In accordance with the provisions of the Maharashtra Regulation and Prevention of Transfer of Government Employees Act, 2005 and with the approval of the competent authority, the engineers in the following table in the Sub Divisional Engineer (Construction) cadre of the Public Works Department shall be registered in front of their names in column No. 4 Being transferred / posted in the post indicated herein: -

Be sure to notify us immediately at this e-mail address.

Also, transferred by the original office as per Rule-30 (c) of the M.N.S. (Leave) Rules, 1981.

para_trans: Government Order No: LTS-2026 / Q. No.18 / Service-2, dated 30/03/2026
"E. The aforesaid ARTA CT Engineers shall appear at the place of immediate appointment in accordance with the said transfer order.
If not, or if any kind of pressure is exerted to cancel the transfer, their action is
It is in violation of Rule 23 of the Maharashtra Civil Services (Conduct) Rules 1979.
Those concerned should note that disciplinary action will be taken against them on the grounds of misconduct.
The Government Order is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
